lint-fix.name: Lint & Fix
lint-fix.description: Run the project linter on recent changes and fix any issues
lint-fix.prompt: Run git diff to see recent changes, then run the project linter and fix any issues found.

explain-diff.name: Explain Changes
explain-diff.description: Summarize what recent git changes do in plain English
explain-diff.prompt: Run git diff to see recent changes. Provide a clear, concise summary of what changed and why it matters. {input}

write-tests.name: Write Tests
write-tests.description: Generate tests for recent code changes
write-tests.prompt: Run git diff to see recent changes. Write comprehensive tests for the changed code. Follow existing test patterns in the project. {input}
